name: unit-test
description: Adds a unit-test pipeline stage after execute that generates comprehensive unit tests for code changes
author: Formic Team

testFramework.description: Preferred test framework (auto, jest, vitest, mocha, pytest). Auto-detect from project config.

coverageThreshold.description: Minimum code coverage percentage target for generated tests

customPrompt.description: Custom prompt or additional instructions for the unit-test skill. Supports template variables: $TASK_TITLE, $TASK_ID, $TASK_DOCS_PATH. Leave empty to use the built-in prompt.

promptMode.description: How to apply the custom prompt: 'append' adds it after the default prompt, 'replace' uses it instead of the default prompt.
